adds.rationale: Adds a profitable aerospace/defense prime with substantive space-systems exposure to fill the rockets_spacecraft bucket without relying on a thinly-traded pure-play; the segment's backlog and government space spending have been firming through 2022.

news_evidence.summary: Lockheed Martin reports Q3 2022 results; Space segment sales of $2.7B with backlog supported by national security space and Orion programs.
NASA's Artemis I launches on SLS with Lockheed-built Orion crew capsule, validating the long-cycle deep-space program Lockheed anchors.
U.S. Space Force FY23 budget request rises to ~$24.5B, lifting the addressable market for prime contractors including Lockheed.

removes.rationale: Thematic ETF whose top holdings are dominated by industrials and logistics names (Trimble, Kratos, AeroVironment) rather than pure rockets/spacecraft exposure; replaced by LMT for a cleaner, more liquid space-systems read at lower expense.

news_evidence.summary: ARK Space Exploration ETF underperformed broader aerospace indices in 2022 amid growth-stock drawdown; holdings remain a heterogeneous mix of industrials, comms, and aerospace.
ARKX 2022 fact sheet shows top weights in Trimble, Kratos, L3Harris - only loosely tied to the rockets/spacecraft thesis the user named.

rationale_overall: Watchlist is at the 12-ticker cap, so any add must be paired with a remove. Swapping ARKX (thematic ETF with off-thesis top holdings) for LMT gives a cleaner, profitable, liquid read on space systems (Orion, national-security space, hypersonics) consistent with the user's rockets/spacecraft thesis, without expanding the watchlist.
